title: Emergency Management Organization Complaints * Child Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Emergency Management Organization Complaints * Child Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MALHEUR EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EASTERN OREGON CHILD CARE RESOURCES CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, advocacy, safety and technical assistance, consultation, and resources for child care providers. Actively recruits child care providers to register as a part of the statewide system of child care providers, and manages provider information for referrals to families in FIND CHILD CARE OREGON (FCCO). Also provides information and consulting to employers about employer-sponsored care and other child care issues. 363 A Street W Vale, OR 97918 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Typically Monday-Friday, but hours vary. Call for information. Email (458) 214-0497 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MALHEUR EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL
